posts.author: daniel.trudeau (Daniel Trudeau)
posts.cookedHtml:
Idea for helpful automation

When Any Change is made to:
[Insert Column Name]
or
[Insert Column Name]
etc…

Then [Insert Action].

I have a giant Asset list. When I make a change on select data, I want it to trigger an action (i.e. ‘Move to a Group’ or ‘update a status’). We are utilizing this between 2 departments where I make updates on the list but I want for the other department to see that they need to do something as soon as I make changes). I did this manually adding 14 different automations based on if a column change but this would be a lot better as a single, ‘If any change’ or you can add ‘or’ statements to add columns in 1 automation.
